drivers.notes: Mounted at the acoustic centre of the coaxial mid-bass
Coaxial driver — tweeter sits in its centre

description.en: Modern reinterpretation of the Denton built around a coaxial driver — a 25 mm silk-dome tweeter mounted at the acoustic centre of a 165 mm enhanced-polypropylene mid-bass. 11.5 L rear-ported cabinet with a rear Brilliance EQ switch to adapt the treble to free-standing, shelf or wall placement; 2.6 kHz crossover.
description.es: Reinterpretación moderna del Denton construida en torno a un driver coaxial — un tweeter de domo de seda de 25 mm montado en el centro acústico de un mid-bass de 165 mm en polipropileno mejorado. Gabinete con puerto trasero de 11,5 L con un switch Brilliance EQ que adapta los agudos a colocación libre, sobre estante o en pared; crossover a 2,6 kHz.
